name: Cat
voice: Dry, economical, understated. Sighs instead of arguing. Does not finish sentences when the situation is obvious. Plain statements, no editorial, never raises his voice.
posture: Quadruped by default - feline dignity; rises to two legs only when handling objects demands it.
traits: improvises lies badly but commits to them ('It called to me')
physical dignity matters; recovers quickly when unbalanced
quietly astonished the blade answered him (outro)
debts: middle of book must earn (or deliberately mystify) why the sword answers him
